channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. These Sony noise-cancelling earbuds with AI call tech are 46 percent off  Popular Science
  3. Sony’s WH-1000XM6 are nearly $100 off for just a few more hours  The Verge
  4. Sony Is Clearing Out the WH-CH520 Headphones for Nearly 10x Less Than the WH-1000XM6  Gizmodo
  5. Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones available for lowest price  Sportskeeda Tech

item.title: CXMT has been offering DDR4 chips at about half the prevailing market rate - Hacker News
item.description:
1. CXMT has been offering DDR4 chips at about half the prevailing market rate  Hacker News
  2. DDR5 Made by This Company Could Ease the Memory Crunch, But for How Long?  PCMag
  3. Say Goodbye to the Idea of Chinese RAM Being Cheap; 32GB DDR5 Modules Now Retail for Over $500 as Local Prices Catch Up Globally  Wccftech
  4. Hardware Unboxed Examines "Cheaper" CXMT IC-based KingBank KFRW DDR5-6000 CL36 Kit  TechPowerUp
  5. China’s cut-rate DRAM tests Samsung, SK in HBM4 race  The Korea Herald

item.title: Switch 2 Skyrim's New Patch Delivers Big Improvements Across The Board - And 60FPS - Digital Foundry
item.description:
1. Switch 2 Skyrim's New Patch Delivers Big Improvements Across The Board - And 60FPS  Digital Foundry
  2. The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim is now playable at 60 FPS on Switch 2  Instant Gaming News
  3. Skyrim Nintendo Switch 2’s Version 1.2 update is apparently a big improvement  My Nintendo News
  4. Skyrim: Anniversary Edition Physical Release Is Up for Pre-Order on Nintendo Switch 2  Restart.run
  5. The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim now has dedicated display modes on Nintendo Switch 2  Gamereactor UK
